ExpandedDescription: Custom widgets override Bootstrap button styles inconsistently, leading to missing focus, low contrast, or broken ARIA on action buttons.
AcceptanceCriteria: All custom widget buttons have full SnowBoots overrides applied with proper focus and contrast.
Test: Test button in custom widget with litmus or axe; confirm passes.
Solution1: Add broad .widget .btn selector in core-overrides.scss

ExpandedDescription: Custom navbars break focus order and landmark roles due to Bootstrap overrides.
AcceptanceCriteria: Custom navbars maintain logical tab order and landmarks.
Test: Tab through custom navbar; confirm order and announcement.
Solution1: Apply navbar fixes to widget classes in core

ExpandedDescription: Custom forms lose label association and placeholder handling.
AcceptanceCriteria: Forms in widgets have proper labels and placeholders.
Test: Test form in widget; confirm label association.
Solution1: Extend form overrides to .widget forms

ExpandedDescription: Widget-specific form controls miss required indicators and error linking.
AcceptanceCriteria: All required fields and errors are properly marked in widgets.
Test: Submit invalid widget form; confirm announcements.
Solution1: Add required/error rules to widget selectors

ExpandedDescription: Custom forms have poor touch targets and focus in Bootstrap overrides.
AcceptanceCriteria: Form controls in widgets meet 44px touch target and focus.
Test: Inspect widget form on mobile; confirm sizes and focus.
Solution1: Min-height overrides in core for widget inputs

ExpandedDescription: Widget forms ignore SnowBoots placeholder and contrast fixes.
AcceptanceCriteria: Placeholders and contrast apply to widget forms.
Test: Test widget input placeholder contrast.
Solution1: Broad selector for .widget .form-control

ExpandedDescription: Custom forms lack ARIA for dynamic fields in widgets.
AcceptanceCriteria: Dynamic fields in widgets have proper ARIA.
Test: Test dynamic widget form with screen reader.
Solution1: ARIA polyfill targeting widget forms

ExpandedDescription: Widget forms have duplicate IDs from Bootstrap patterns.
AcceptanceCriteria: No duplicate IDs in widget forms.
Test: Run axe on widget; confirm unique IDs.
Solution1: Unique ID prefix in widget templates

ExpandedDescription: Custom forms miss SnowBoots table header fixes when containing tables.
AcceptanceCriteria: Tables inside widgets have proper headers.
Test: Test widget with embedded table.
Solution1: Extend table overrides to .widget table

ExpandedDescription: Widget forms break reduced motion and focus persistence.
AcceptanceCriteria: Widget forms respect reduced motion and persistent focus.
Test: Test widget form with reduced motion emulation.
Solution1: Reduced motion rules applied to widgets

ExpandedDescription: Reference icons in lists are skipped or not focusable in custom widgets.
AcceptanceCriteria: All reference icons are keyboard reachable.
Test: Tab through list with reference icons.
Solution1: Add tabindex and role in core for reference classes

ExpandedDescription: Custom widgets do not inherit dark theme contrast fixes.
AcceptanceCriteria: Widgets respect dark theme overrides.
Test: Switch to dark theme and test widget.
Solution1: Extend vars to widget classes

ExpandedDescription: Charts in widgets lack pattern alternatives for color-blind users.
AcceptanceCriteria: Charts have patterns or data tables.
Test: Test chart widget with color-blind simulator.
Solution1: Add pattern CSS or table fallback

ExpandedDescription: Custom widgets use unexplained jargon without definitions.
AcceptanceCriteria: All jargon has tooltips or expansions.
Test: Screen reader test on widget content.
Solution1: Add title or aria-describedby

ExpandedDescription: Widget content is not localized for screen reader language.
AcceptanceCriteria: Content respects page lang attribute.
Test: Test with screen reader language change.
Solution1: HTML lang propagation to widgets

ExpandedDescription: Widgets use inconsistent button/form styles vs core.
AcceptanceCriteria: All widgets match SnowBoots styles.
Test: Visual comparison of widget vs core.
Solution1: Broad widget class overrides in core

ExpandedDescription: Complex custom fields lack help text or instructions.
AcceptanceCriteria: Complex fields have associated help.
Test: Test complex widget field.
Solution1: Add aria-describedby for help

ExpandedDescription: Widgets use text inputs for dates/emails without proper types.
AcceptanceCriteria: Inputs use semantic types (date, email).
Test: Inspect widget inputs.
Solution1: Override input types in widget templates

ExpandedDescription: Custom date/time fields lack proper ARIA and keyboard support.
AcceptanceCriteria: Date/time fields are fully accessible.
Test: Test date widget.
Solution1: Extend date picker fixes to widgets

ExpandedDescription: Custom search bars lack prominent focus and labeling.
AcceptanceCriteria: Search bars are clearly labeled and focused.
Test: Tab to search in widget.
Solution1: Enhance search overrides for widgets
